subcodes.first_line: O friends of Abdu'l-Baha! Your outcry and lamentation hath reached the Concourse on High, and assuredly your sighs and moaning [3.5s]... ...O Lord, our God! We are helpless; Thou art the Lord of strength and power. We are wretched; Thou art the Almighty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء فریاد و فغان شما بملاء اعلی رسیده و آه و انین شما یقین است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for teaching, @prayer for detachment
